route: San Isidro combi (likely Ruta 23 - San Isidro)
claim: Serves the corridor from Camino a San Isidro (San Diego Chalma, ~[-97.3521, 18.4458]) to Centro Comercial El Paseo (~[-97.4172, 18.4692]) as one route.
data_gap: Mapped 2023 trace for Ruta 23 - San Isidro ends ~910 m from the Camino a San Isidro point and ~2.8 km from El Paseo. No route in the dataset connects both points.
action: Re-ride and record with Traccar to capture current full route.

claim: Not a distinct route: the actual bus continues well beyond San Sebastián Zinacatepec. Moovit's entry is likely a segment/ramal label of a longer intercity line.
action: Excluded from map. Verify the real line's full extent with a recorded ride before re-adding.

claim: Ruta 14 has disappeared; union reps say routes 15, 6, 12 and 3 may stop operating due to costs/fares. Explains the number-14 gap in the dataset.
action: Watch these routes' traces for service decline; do not assign 14 to any unnamed route.

claim: At least 2 routes serve San Sebastián Zinacatepec: one connecting from the Ajalpan corridor, and one passing through it (continuing beyond). Neither is in the mapped geometry.
action: Priority mapping target: ride both with Traccar. Until then the planner can only offer Ajalpan + long walk.
